side_effects.description: Cystic acne on cheek/chin during each of 3 injection cycles; no prior history of acne. Topical application does not cause this effect.

protocol_notes: Completed 3 separate injection cycles each approximately 6 months apart. First cycle persisted for 5 weeks before stopping. Second and third cycles stopped at week 2 due to recurrent cystic acne. Also makes own topical formulation with GHK-CU powder, snap-8, argireline, HA, and matrixyl. Has switched to topical only.
